title: Add comment to a task
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
I’m new to Monday.com and I’m investigating if I can call API to add comment to a task. 
I couldn’t find out answer from searching. 
So is it impossible ? 
Can someone help me with docs ?

posts.author: ainoidoi89 (Chi Ngo Duc)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

I’m new to Monday.com and I’m investigating if I can call API to add comment to a task.

I couldn’t find out answer from searching.

So is it impossible ?

Can someone help me with docs ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ainoidoi89 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can create updates for items via API! Here is the article that explains how it works

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: ainoidoi89 (Chi Ngo Duc)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday

Sorry if this is a funny question.

I read the document you provided, so you mean each item’s update is a comment ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @ainoidoi89,

There are no silly questions!

Yes. We call “comments” “updates”. You can find out all about them here

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: ainoidoi89 (Chi Ngo Duc)
posts.cookedHtml:
Matias:

d out all about th

Thank you so much @Matias.Monday !

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Happy to help @ainoidoi89
